summary: Complete UI/UX redesign verification - All features tested successfully. Landing page shows new asymmetric hero design with Lady Justice image, Deep Indigo (#1E1B4B) + Burnished Amber (#B45309) color scheme, quick links bar, 6 feature cards. Dashboard has new sidebar navigation with all menu items, stats cards, dark mode toggle. Navigation to Forms, FAQ, and Lawyers pages all work correctly.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only, not user-facing)

passed_tests: Landing page loads with new design - Deep Indigo + Burnished Amber color scheme
Hero section displays Lady Justice image from Unsplash
All Australian States & Territories badge visible with state pills (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT, Federal)
Sign In button opens auth modal
Dark/Light mode toggle works on landing page (Moon/Sun icons swap)
Quick links bar shows Forms & Templates, Success Stories, Legal Glossary, FAQ
Features section shows 6 cards: Document Upload, AI Timeline, Appeal Grounds, Reports, Case Comparison, Secure Storage
User registration flow works correctly
Terms acceptance checkbox and button work correctly
Dashboard loads with new sidebar navigation
Dashboard sidebar shows: Home, My Cases, Forms & Templates, Find Lawyers, Legal Glossary, FAQ
Dashboard stats cards show Total Cases, Documents, Timeline Events
Dark mode toggle in sidebar works (Light Mode/Dark Mode text changes)
New Case button opens Create New Case dialog
New Case dialog has all fields: Title, Defendant Name, Offence Category, Specific Offence, State/Territory, Case Number, Court, Presiding Judge, Case Summary
Navigation to /forms page works - shows Legal Form Templates with state filter buttons
Navigation to /faq page works - shows Frequently Asked Questions with accordion
Navigation to /lawyers page works - shows Find a Criminal Appeal Lawyer with National Resources and Resources by State
User info displayed in sidebar with email and Sign Out button
Glass morphism header effect applied
Crimson Pro font used for headings
Manrope font used for body text
critical_code_review_comments: UI redesign successfully implemented with new color scheme and layout
Sidebar navigation provides better organization than previous scattered layout
Dark mode implementation working across all pages
Forms page properly shows state-specific download options
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete UI/UX redesign verified. New design uses Deep Indigo (#1E1B4B) and Burnished Amber (#B45309) color palette with Crimson Pro (headings) and Manrope (body) fonts. Dashboard now has sidebar navigation instead of top tabs. All navigation links work correctly. Forms page shows Legal Form Templates with state filters. FAQ page has working accordion. Lawyers page shows national and state resources.
